name: Instagram Engagement Rate Calculator
description: Measure engagement percentage for your posts.

example.explanation: Engagement rate measures how actively followers interact with posts.

faqs.question: What's a good CPM for my niche?
faqs.answer: Varies widely: Finance/Tech ($10-20), Entertainment ($2-5), News ($5-10). Location matters: US/UK CPM > India CPM.

faqs.question: How do I increase my CPM?
faqs.answer: Attract US/UK audience, create evergreen content, improve watch time, use AdSense optimization, avoid demonetized topics.

faqs.question: What's the difference between CPM and RPM?
faqs.answer: CPM: advertiser pays per 1K impressions. RPM: you receive per 1K impressions. RPM = CPM × (~55-70%) after platform cut.

faqs.question: How long until I can monetize?
faqs.answer: YouTube: 1K subscribers + 4K watch hours (recent 12 months). Instagram: 10K followers. TikTok: eligible from day 1.

faqs.question: Which platform pays best?
faqs.answer: YouTube highest CPM, but Instagram/TikTok better for growth. Diversify: YouTube > TikTok Shop > Patreon > Affiliate.

faqs.question: How do I optimize thumbnails?
faqs.answer: Bright colors, clear faces/expressions, minimal text (3-5 words), high contrast, consistency. A/B test variations.

concept: Creator economy calculators help you analyze content performance, revenue models, and growth metrics for YouTube, Instagram, and affiliate marketing.
guideSteps: Enter your channel metrics (followers, engagement, views, CPM).
Click Calculate to see estimated earnings, growth metrics, and optimization opportunities.
Use insights to strategize content, pricing, and platform focus.
standards: YouTube: CPM varies $0.25-$20 depending on niche and audience location.
Instagram: Engagement rates: 1-3% organic, 3-6% with good content.
TikTok: Average CPM $0.20-$0.40; highly variable by region and niche.
Affiliate commission: 2-30% depending on product and program.
CTR benchmark: Help audiences click (4-10% for thumbnails is good).
